name: Shadowhands
summary: Covert branch of ORE specialized in corruption, contraband, and illicit magic investigations.
motive: Neutralize hidden threats before they become public destabilizers.
power_relations: Subordinate to ORE command and politically useful to House Roaz
visible_membership_base: Case officers, infiltrators, informants, raid teams.
civilian_contact_surface: usually indirect: disappearances, quiet arrests, rumor of surveillance
current_tension_or_vulnerability: The more successful they are, the harder public accountability becomes.
